{{Infobox character
| name = Rebel Queen
| titles = {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Rebel Queen]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Empire, Karoshan exiles}}{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|, [[The Zenith Starship|Zenith Starship]]}}
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Engineer (novel)|The Engineer]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Shyrax the Third]] is the forty-one-year-old sovereign of the planet [[Karosha]], having ascended to the throne nine years ago following her mother's abdication. Although she was officially convicted of treason by the [[Dragon Court]], leading to her imprisonment and the temporary installation of [[King Regent]] [[Felrex]], she is widely believed to have escaped into exile. Now known as the Rebel [[Queen]], she has been actively recruiting soldiers throughout [[Alliance space]] and commanding a rebel fleet. Shyrax is a multifaceted leader who serves as the [[Commander]] of [[The Last Horizon]] and the Guardian of [[Shadow Ark]], while also possessing skills as a journeyman Technician. In combat, she utilizes telekinesis and a glowing gold wand to direct her [[Karoshan]] troops. Her presence serves as a political alternative to the current regency, though her military actions, such as those in the [[Dornoth system]], have drawn significant scrutiny.}}

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Rebel Queen]] is associated with the [[Empire]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c33">''The Engineer'', chapter 33</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Rebel Queen]] leads a force of [[Karoshan]] exiles.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c35">''The Engineer'', chapter 35</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Rebel Queen]] had her hands full with the remaining [[Advocates]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c52">''The Engineer'', chapter 52</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Rebel Queen]] is associated with the [[Zenith]] Starship.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c1">''The Pilot'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|A [[Rebel Queen]] exists as an alternative to the rule of the [[King Regent]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c27">''The Pilot'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
